author: yesbhautik
name: Combined Optimal V2: MLP 3x + STE int6 QAT + Sliding Window + Tuned Muon
blurb: Val-only training with 9-layer MLP-3x (h=1536), STE fake-int6 quantization-aware training, mixed post-training quantization (int6 per-row blocks, int8 per-row embedding), sliding window eval stride=64, tuned Muon (momentum 0.99, LR 0.02, seq4096).
